name: econ-writing-agents
description: Multi-agent orchestrator for empirical-economics writing: 14 specialist agents and 35 principles (incl. causal identification and regression-table auditing) for review, drafting, polishing, table/figure work, bibliography hygiene, and literature surveys (RePEc/NBER/SSRN). Adapted from andrehuang/academic-writing-agents.

author.name: adapted from Haiwen Huang's academic-writing-agents for empirical economics
